name: HomePilot Editorial Team
bio: The HomePilot Editorial Team researches practical home products through buyer-intent analysis, specification review, ownership-friction checks, and structured product comparisons. Recommendations focus on durable criteria rather than temporary prices, ratings, or review counts.
reviewNote: Reviewed for product-fit clarity, Amazon Associates compliance, internal-link usefulness, and avoidance of unsupported price or rating claims.

name: Maya Hart
bio: Maya focuses on small kitchen appliances and practical ownership details: capacity, cleaning friction, storage, controls, and whether a product still feels useful after the first week.
reviewNote: Reviewed for appliance workflow accuracy, buyer-fit language, and compliant retailer-link usage.

name: Eli Morgan
bio: Eli covers floor-care automation and home coffee gear with an emphasis on setup complexity, replacement parts, maintenance routines, and matching product features to real household habits.
reviewNote: Reviewed for practical buyer guidance, internal-link quality, and compliance with HomePilot disclosure standards.
